description:
Download, view, convert to MP3, and manage all your audible.com content with our easy-to-use desktop application.

See all your Audible books in one location, on all your Mac, Windows, and Linux computers. Automatically organize your books as an HTML library.

For audible regions: US, UK, DE, FR, AU, JP, CA
summary: An open-source cross-platform audible audiobook manager. With over 200 stars by github developers, OpenAudible is the trusted audio book content manager.
author: OpenAudible
